name: Student progress card creation
script: // assessment\_result\_list.js // Place this file at: // [your\_app]/[your\_app]/public/js/assessment\_result\_list.js // OR as a Frappe override at: // [your\_app]/[your\_app]/public/js/override/assessment\_result\_list.js // Then register it in hooks.py: // doctype\_list\_js = {"Assessment Result": "public/js/assessment\_result\_list.js"} frappe.listview\_settings["Assessment Result"] = { onload: function (listview) { listview.page.add\_inner\_button(\_\_("Create Progress Card"), function () { show\_progress\_card\_dialog(listview); }); }, }; function show\_progress\_card\_dialog(listview) { let dialog = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ title: \_\_("Create Student Progress Card"), fields: [ { label: \_\_("Assessment Group"), fieldname: "assessment\_group", fieldtype: "Link", options: "Assessment Group", reqd: 1, }, { label: \_\_("Academic Year"), fieldname: "academic\_year", fieldtype: "Link", options: "Academic Year", reqd: 1, }, { label: \_\_("Student Group"), fieldname: "student\_group", fieldtype: "Link", options: "Student Group", reqd: 1, }, ], primary\_action\_label: \_\_("Create Student Progress Card"), primary\_action: function (values) { dialog.hide(); create\_student\_progress\_cards( values.assessment\_group, values.academic\_year, values.student\_group, listview ); }, }); dialog.show(); } function create\_student\_progress\_cards(assessment\_group, academic\_year, student\_group, listview) { // Show a progress indicator while fetching data frappe.show\_progress(\_\_("Creating Progress Cards"), 0, 100, \_\_("Fetching assessment results...")); // Step 1: Fetch all Assessment Results for the given filters frappe.call({ method: "frappe.client.get\_list", args: { doctype: "Assessment Result", filters: { assessment\_group: assessment\_group, student\_group: student\_group, }, fields: [ "name", "student", "student\_name", "assessment\_plan", "assessment\_group", "student\_group", "academic\_year", "course", "total\_score", "maximum\_score", "grade", "program", "grading\_scale", ], limit\_page\_length: 500, }, callback: function (r) { if (!r.message || r.message.length === 0) { frappe.hide\_progress(); frappe.msgprint({ title: \_\_("No Results Found"), message: \_\_( "No Assessment Results found for the selected Assessment Group and Student Group." ), indicator: "orange", }); return; } // Group results by student let students = {}; r.message.forEach(function (result) { if (!students[result.student]) { students[result.student] = { student: result.student, student\_name: result.student\_name, program: result.program || "", grading\_scale: result.grading\_scale || "", details: [], }; } students[result.student].details.push({ assessment\_plan: result.assessment\_plan, course: result.course, maximum\_score: result.maximum\_score || 0, score: result.total\_score || 0, grade: result.grade || "", }); }); let student\_list = Object.values(students); let total = student\_list.length; let created = 0; let skipped = 0; let errors = 0; let promises = []; // Step 2: Create a Student Progress Card per student student\_list.forEach(function (student\_data) { // Build the ID: student\_name + assessment\_group + academic\_year let progress\_card\_id = student\_data.student\_name + "-" + assessment\_group + "-" + academic\_year; // Calculate totals let total\_max\_score = student\_data.details.reduce( (sum, d) => sum + (d.maximum\_score || 0), 0 ); let total\_score = student\_data.details.reduce( (sum, d) => sum + (d.score || 0), 0 ); let doc = { doctype: "Student Progress Card", name: progress\_card\_id, id: progress\_card\_id, student: student\_data.student, student\_name: student\_data.student\_name, academic\_year: academic\_year, assessment\_group: assessment\_group, student\_group: student\_group, program: student\_data.program, grading\_scale: student\_data.grading\_scale, total\_max\_score: total\_max\_score, total\_score: total\_score, details: student\_data.details, }; let p = frappe .call({ method: "frappe.client.insert", args: { doc: doc }, callback: function (res) { if (res.message) { created++; } }, error: function (err) { // If duplicate, count as skipped if ( err && err.responseJSON && err.responseJSON.exc\_type === "DuplicateEntryError" ) { skipped++; } else { errors++; console.error( "Error creating progress card for " + student\_data.student\_name, err ); } }, }) .then(function () { let done = created + skipped + errors; frappe.show\_progress( \_\_("Creating Progress Cards"), done, total, \_\_("Processing {0} of {1}...", [done, total]) ); }); promises.push(p); }); // Step 3: After all cards are created, show summary Promise.all(promises).then(function () { frappe.hide\_progress(); let msg\_parts = []; if (created > 0) msg\_parts.push( '**' + created + " card(s) created successfully.**" ); if (skipped > 0) msg\_parts.push( '**' + skipped + " card(s) skipped (already exist).**" ); if (errors > 0) msg\_parts.push( '**' + errors + " card(s) failed. Check console.**" ); frappe.msgprint({ title: \_\_("Progress Cards Summary"), message: msg\_parts.join(", "), indicator: errors > 0 ? "red" : created > 0 ? "green" : "orange", }); if (listview) listview.refresh(); }); }, }); }
